items.title: Modular & scalable
items.desc: Wide range of sizes with height adjustment — pick the footprint that fits the room and set the working level to suit each user.

items.title: Accessory ready
items.desc: Mount monitor arms, CPU holders, cable trays, and power modules without drilling. The under-desk rail accepts 30+ certified accessories from day one or after years of use.

items.title: Quick & simple assembly
items.desc: Pre-assembled frame keeps installation fast and straightforward. One person can complete a full desk without specialist help.

items.title: Seamless welded joints
items.desc: Profile joints are welded and finished without visible seams, leaving the frame clean and uniform from every angle.

items.title: Optional return desk
items.desc: A side return can be attached to extend the work surface — useful for L-shape setups and longer workstations.
